notes:
HOTFIX for 1.3.97 regression — /v1/responses returned 500 Internal Server Error for ALL models.

The 1.3.97 DSV4 system-prompt injection at create_response referenced _is_dsv4 BEFORE its canonical definition site (line 5367), producing NameError: name '_is_dsv4' is not defined. This affected every /v1/responses request, regardless of model family.

User repro 2026-04-26 with dealignai/MiniMax-M2.7-JANGTQ-CRACK:
  POST /v1/responses HTTP/1.1" 500 Internal Server Error

Fix: redefine _is_dsv4_resp_msgs locally in create_response at the message-build site. Same defensive pattern already used in create_chat_completion at line 5241.

Verified: POST /v1/responses → 200 OK on user's exact prompt against MiniMax-M2.7-Small-JANGTQ.

IMPACT: If you hit a 500 on /v1/responses on 1.3.97, restart the app after auto-update fetches 1.3.98. /v1/chat/completions, /api/chat (Ollama), /v1/messages (Anthropic) were unaffected by the regression.

Update channels: GH release v1.3.98, latest.json 1.3.98, PyPI vmlx 1.3.98, engine __version__ 1.3.98, panel package.json 1.3.98.

SHA256: c56086f88cd54445a712cf2ce68cd4e961dfb28792a7e016b9f241ef292290ba
